summary: If the hacker' = Margin of Success exceeds

mechanics.name_guess: If the hacker' = Margin of Success exceeds
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 099 > npcs > If the hacker' = Margin of Success exceeds
mechanics.excerpt: If the hacker' = Margin of Success exceeds the sysop' MoS by three or more, the intrusion goes unnoticed Otherwise_ the sysop is aware of the breach and may shut down the system in 106 turns Once inside system; hacking character can act freely; though complex tasks may require Action Checks (bad failures and fumbles may alert sysop at the gamemaster'= discretion).
